title: Delgar
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
summary: Production-ready e-commerce platform built for a local frozen food business, combining a modern customer ordering experience with administrative product and order management.
overview: Delgar is a custom e-commerce platform developed for a local frozen food business. The system provides customers with a responsive online ordering experience and gives administrators dedicated tools for managing products, orders, and customer information.
problem: The business needed a more structured digital ordering experience and a centralized way to manage product and order information instead of relying on fragmented manual processes.
role: Full Stack Web Developer responsible for the frontend application, backend REST APIs, administrative workflows, and overall system implementation.
solution: Designed and developed a Nuxt.js frontend with Tailwind CSS and connected it to Django REST Framework APIs backed by PostgreSQL. The platform centralizes product presentation, customer ordering, and administrative order management.
features: Responsive product catalogue and customer ordering interface
RESTful APIs for product and order data
Administrative dashboard for managing products, orders, and customer information
Reusable frontend components designed for maintainability
Responsive layouts optimized for desktop and mobile use

technicalDecisions.reason: Used to create a responsive, component-based customer ordering experience.
Used to separate business data and application logic behind maintainable RESTful APIs.
Used as the relational data layer for structured product, customer, and order information.

challenges: Structuring product, customer, and order workflows so the customer-facing experience remained simple while administrators had enough information to manage day-to-day operations.
outcomes: Delivered a production-ready e-commerce platform that established a modern online ordering experience and centralized core product and order management workflows for the business.
